title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Addressed Claude review findings on provider handoff contract. Tightened two-phase mechanics: phase 2 verifies response against persisted request, adopts request-side identity, reacquires lock, rechecks duplicate/no-op state, and cannot run standalone. Added session privacy gate direction, advisory person ID handling, provider_host provenance, failure-semantics dependency, and request/response file lifecycle rules.
next_actions: Before implementing session provider path, land provider failure semantics: typed provider failure exit 5, provider-validation exit 6, and ingest_failed ledger recording before primary artifacts. Then implement session provider request/response helpers, privacy.allow_session_provider, --provider session two-phase CLI, request-bound identity verification, and tests for stale response/no-op behavior.
continuation_hint: Next: Before implementing session provider path, land provider failure semantics: typed provider failure exit 5, provider-validation exit 6, and ingest_failed ledger recording before primary artifacts. Then implement session provider request/response helpers, privacy.allow_session_provider, --provider session two-phase CLI, request-bound identity verification, and tests for stale response/no-op behavior.
